title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.
Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Codex Four Parts · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt codex practice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt codex practice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Which action demonstrates Codex Four Parts without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.

content.text: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: prompt codex practice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Codex Four Parts, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Codex requires a rigid magic prompt syntax. This fails the Codex Four Parts contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: OpenAI Codex Manual: Prompting and Best Practices (Verified current 2026-07-13) — Controls Codex prompting, Plan mode, AGENTS.md, verification, and surface guidance.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt codex practice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

stimulus.title: Codex Review Verify case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt codex practice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Codex-generated code can skip independent verification.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion. Artifact under review: a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Codex Review Verify, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Codex Review Verify applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion.
